subcodes.first_line: O servant who gazeth upon the Face! Hearken thou unto the sweet melody of the Most Exalted Pen in the Persian tongue. I swear by Him Who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عبد ناظر الی الوجه صریر قلم اعلی را بلسان پارسی احلی بشنو قسم بمقدریکه
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @He Whom God Shall Make Manifest; the Bab and Baha'u'llah, @contention and conflict
